positive: A highly detailed, centered graphic illustration featuring intertwined bioluminescent coral and stylized deep-sea fauna, creating a complex yet flowing pattern. The composition should maximize negative space and utilize strong, contrasting silhouettes. Style should be a modern, intricate linocut etching combined with glowing nebula elements, giving it a magical, cosmic feel. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric purple, and crisp white, ensuring the colors pop on fabric. The overall aesthetic must be highly graphic, suitable for repeating or large-format apparel printing, with razor-sharp lines and symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, low detail, noise, photographic, realism
